case_title: DINTCHO, STANLEY DDS VS MYERS, DAYNE

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24809, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DINTCHO, STANLEY DDS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MYERS, DAYNE NEITHER PARTY SHALL TAKE ANYTHING FROM THE OTHER. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24809 ON 12-13-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
